dj_piggy.description: DJ Piggy — Social, creative hybrid. Collectibles at Tarumba's Farm.

common.legal: Adults only. Comply with local regulations on collectibles. We do not encourage illegal cultivation.

dj_piggy.subtitle: Booth on fire
dj_piggy.lead: The mental and social monster. Less body, more head. Cheerful chaos, high energy, constant motion.
dj_piggy.p1: The party starts in your head.
dj_piggy.p2: Ideas, laughter, chaos… everything spikes at once.
dj_piggy.p3: DJ Piggy won't chill you out—it spins you up.
dj_piggy.p4: DJ Piggy wasn't built to stay quiet. It was built to fire up the engine.
dj_piggy.p5: The lift is on the inside: faster thoughts, easy conversation, loose laughter, and a sense of motion. The plant is more open and less compact, with a more complex aroma profile and a less physical hit than its heavier sisters. It doesn't relax the body—it wakes up the head. And if you overdo it, it can speed up more than you'd like.
dj_piggy.spec_lead: Hybrid with sativa lean. Active, cerebral, great for social or creative moments.
dj_piggy.li5: Airier plant with a more pronounced mental edge
dj_piggy.c3: More complex aroma: citrus, haze, sweet
dj_piggy.s3d: Social lift, ready to make plans.
dj_piggy.s4d: If you overdo it, it can race too hard. Pace yourself.
dj_piggy.crit2: It doesn't get in for being pretty
dj_piggy.crit3: It gets in for a sharp, social, on-the-move head
dj_piggy.made_for: Socializing · Creativity · Music, art · Daytime activities

checkout.meta_description: Complete your collectibles order at Tarumba's Farm. Discreet shipping to mainland Spain.
checkout.heading: Checkout
checkout.error_cart_empty: Add at least one line to your order before paying.
checkout.error_validation_summary: Some required fields are missing or invalid. Check the highlighted fields.
checkout.field_invalid_email: That email address does not look valid.
checkout.field_error_cart_empty: Add at least one product to your order before paying.

checkout.ph_phone: Optional, in case we need to reach you
checkout.ship_pickup: Pickup (only if available in your area)
checkout.ship_note: Timing and delivery window are confirmed by email.
checkout.pay_secure_hint: Card payments are processed in the bank's encrypted environment. We never store your card number.
checkout.order_empty: You have not added products yet. Choose variety and pack, then tap “Add to order”.
checkout.redirect_notice: Redirecting you to the secure Redsys gateway…
checkout.secure_note: Charges are confirmed on the bank side. We never store card data.

checkout.error_payment_card: To pay now, choose card (gateway). Bank transfer will be available soon.

checkout.foot_legal: Adults only. Collectibles. Comply with local law. We do not encourage illegal cultivation.
checkout.foot_help_prefix: If something does not look right, email us at
checkout.ok_lead: If your bank authorised the payment, you will get a confirmation email. The final status is always confirmed by the server notification (may take a few seconds).
checkout.ko_lead: You can try again or choose another method. If a charge shows as pending with your bank, wait for confirmation or contact your bank.
